prediction.reasoning: Based on SPGI's historical volatility of approximately 20-25% annually and its position as a relatively stable financial services company, I applied a geometric Brownian motion model with daily volatility around 1.5%. The slight positive drift reflects the long-term upward trend typical of established S&P 500 companies.
